title: Russia approved secret China military training at top level, sources say
abstract: This tool provides in-depth analysis of the secretly approved military cooperation between Russia and China, offering comprehensive insights into the strategic partnership and its implications.
abstract_zh: 来来来，这工具就是专门扒俄罗斯和中国秘密军事合作那点事的，分析得透透彻彻的，让你不仅知道俩国家是啥关系了，还知道这对整个战略合作意味着什么！跟你说实话，这种深度分析，看完你脑子里肯定就会出现一个超级大国联盟的大场面了。
